title: Woman drowns at Victoria Bay: Inquest docket opened
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - George police have...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - George police have opened an inquest docket following the drowning of a 21-year-old woman at Victoria Bay on Friday 31 October at about 17:20.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - George police have opened an inquest docket following the drowning of a 21-year-old woman at Victoria Bay on Friday 31 October at about 17:20."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, emergency personnel were called to the beach after two women went missing in the water."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Both were later retrieved, but one was declared dead by paramedics on the scene. The other was transported by ambulance to a nearby medical facility, where her condition was described as serious at the time,\" Spies said in a statement.","html":"\"Both were later retrieved, but one was declared dead by paramedics on the scene. The other was transported by ambulance to a nearby medical facility, where her condition was described as serious at the time,\" Spies said in a statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on the George Herald","html":"Read more on the George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Woman drowns at Victoria Bay: Inquest docket opened
